text: Find all notes about LightRAG deployment methods including Docker, Kubernetes configs, and Windows setup scripts
Create a bilingual documentation index that maps English README files with their Chinese counterparts in the LightRAG vault
Research the RAG evaluation methodology from the LightRAG evaluation folder and document the RAGA-based approach
Organize the LightRAG docs folder contents by topic including Deployment, Algorithm, Frontend, and Interactive Setup categories
Connect the 5-Phase policy analysis guide with the research synthesis engine to create a unified workflow document
Generate a security checklist combining the SECURITY notes with the workspace isolation test procedures from LightRAG tests folder
